word: H5153 - נָחוּשׁ - nâchûwsh - naw-khoosh' - Of brass

sections.paragraph:
Original: נחוּשׁ

Transliteration: nâchûsh

Phonetic: naw-khoosh'

BDB Definition:

  1. bronze

Origin: apparently pass participle of H5172 (perhaps in the sense of ringing, i.e. bell-metal

TWOT entry: 1349b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
